body_transformation: The plump rounded body now features a soft ivory-white skin texture with delicate lavender petal patterns that follow the natural contours of the silhouette, while the leaf bulb on the back transforms into a compact, crystalline heart-shaped orb with glowing starlight silver veins. The curled spiral tail tip gains a subtle shimmer of petal gold, and the short stubby legs are now covered in smooth, translucent hooves with a faint lavender gradient. Red eyes with white highlights remain, but now glow with a soft, ethereal light like captured starlight.
signature_feature: Back orb: crystalline heart with starlight silver veins and petal-gold accents.
